title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates scaling his AI Dark Factory by combining Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 models. Opus handles deep reasoning and planning tasks while Kimi K2.6 manages implementation, validation, and research to maintain token efficiency. The system uses Archon, an open-source AI coding harness, to orchestrate multi-model workflows.
